issues.description: Condition is 'TurnCount' but should be 'LeaderHasLife' or similar checking Life card count ≤ 3. Current condition does not match 'If you have 3 or less Life cards'
Action type is 'SearchDeck' but card text specifies playing from 'trash', not deck. Should be 'PlayFromHand' or equivalent trash-sourced action
Filter only checks name 'Mary Geoise' but misses type requirement ('Stage' type) and cost requirement (cost of 1). Filter must include type and cost constraints
Missing quantity limit: text says 'up to 1' but action does not specify maxCount or similar constraint
